text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As I pass through the central plaza...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh-ho? Is that you, Cafe? I note your gaze is
directed quite far off into the distance...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What is it that you're looking at? What presence
does that brain of yours detect?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Nothing special. Just the usual.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
My friend went on a run... so I was just watching
them.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
AHAHAHA! That "friend" of yours again, eh? Ah,
you truly are a fascinating case!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: You gaze into nothingness, and yet you insist that someone's there!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Whether you speak falsehood or truth, I must
know what's inside of that head of yours! Say
there, Cafe, would you allow me to take a little
peek at your brain?!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...I'll have to refuse.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat? Now, now! Don't be like that! This is the
perfect opportunity to uncover the unknowns of
Umakind!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Achoo!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, you're such a wet blanket today... and
every other day.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Her claims seem too concrete to be lies, and
yet, there's no hard evidence to prove their
veracity. Low probability of this being a defense
mechanism... No abnormalities with her nervous
system. I have to examine her brain...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...You're still here?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh ho, Cafe?! What brings you back?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Could it be that you're burning with curiousity? Yes! It's only natural that you'd become interested!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It's... going to rain.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The air has been getting colder for a while now...
I'm sure you feel cold too...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I brought some hot coffee... Enough for... two
people.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Hmm. And that's why you returned? Or rather,
that's what you left for in the first place?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Then you should have said something!
Although I'd like to add that perhaps an umbrella
would have been more approp—

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'll drink them both if you don't want one.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: No, don't be silly! I'd love one!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now then, let's go before the rain starts in
earnest... Hmm.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yes! I've actually developed a solution that
transforms any coffee into a saccharine delight
with just a single drop! Please participate in my
exp—

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, the two of them return to the
academy.
